name: Quercetin Phytosome
summary: Quercetin phytosome is a bioavailability-enhanced quercetin formulation. Human outcome evidence remains limited, with small effects reported for vascular or inflammatory markers.
description: Phospholipid-complex quercetin formulation intended to improve absorption and support antioxidant/endothelial pathways.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated; potential CYP interactions remain relevant to quercetin-containing products.
contraindications: warfarin due to potential increased bleeding risk from altered drug metabolism
quinolone antibiotics due to altered drug absorption or effectiveness
cyclosporine or other CYP3A4-metabolized medications due to altered drug levels at high doses
antihypertensive medication due to additive blood pressure lowering effect
pregnancy or breastfeeding without clinician guidance due to insufficient safety data
kidney problems warrant clinician guidance before use
